queue_item.action: Add a standards-linked temporal-correlation gate so microphone tone detection must overlap the predicted Web Audio output window.

progress.finding: getOutputTimestamp() maps a nearby scheduled context time into performance time at the output device; a microphone detection should not count as correlated unless it overlaps a declared capture-delay and tolerance window around that prediction.
progress.verification: 5 deterministic Node tests passed against byte-identical pre-commit source

queue_item.handoff: Vercel Studio should sample getOutputTimestamp() immediately around pulse scheduling, pass the pulse schedule and microphone detection interval through this gate, and require acceptedAsTemporalCorrelation before R-036 can be upgraded to strong acoustic evidence. Calibrate captureDelayRangeMs per session and preserve only derived timing evidence.

canonical_queue_update: not overwritten; append-only queue update preserves concurrent team state
